verse_text: Then Moses said to the Lord, 'I pray, O Lord, I am not capable, neither before nor since You spoke to Your servant; but I am weak in speech and slow of tongue.'

links.context: Like Moses before him ([[EXO.4:10]]), Jeremiah claims he does not know how to speak. As with all the prophets, God put His words in Jeremiah's mouth (v. 9).
